title: hypselandra
intro: Hypselandra is a plant species, also known as Stephania glabra or Stephania rotundifolia, native to Southeast Asia and the Pacific Islands. The roots of the Hypselandra plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits associated with Hypselandra include its ability to help lower blood pressure, improve kidney function, and reduce the risk of certain types of cancer. Hypselandra is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its root is also used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and capsules.
